summary: Iteration 2 — Message #347 closeout (footer brand, right-click context menu, workspace-scoped Cost Dashboard, tightened markdown styling). 13/14 backend pytest cases pass on first run; 1 streaming test was a test-harness bug (SSE 'event:' lines parsed, not JSON 'type'), fixed and now 14/14 pass. All 5 critical frontend UI checks pass — sidebar footer text exact match, zero 'Emergent' string occurrences across all 8 routes, right-click context menu (rename/delete + Escape close + inline rename), Cost workspace-scope badge default + live update on workspace switch, Markdown H1 in Cormorant Garamond #C9A84C + .md-table zebra striping confirmed.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend GET /api/stats workspace filter is correct: messages don't carry workspace_id natively, so resolution goes via session lookup (server.py:430). Slight performance note: for very large workspaces this materializes all session_ids in-memory before the $in match — fine for MVP, but consider an aggregation $lookup or denormalising workspace_id onto messages if traffic grows.
ChatView.js openMenu uses fixed hardcoded width/height (180×92) to clamp menu to viewport (lines 222-224). If menu content changes, clamping will drift. Minor — acceptable for MVP.
React Router v7 warnings on every navigation (v7_startTransition, v7_relativeSplatPath). Non-functional, but adding future flags would silence them.
WorkspaceSelector menu opens on click and closes only on mouseLeave/option-click — clicking outside the menu but inside the page does not close it. Minor UX nit.
seed_data_creation: Created via test runs: several TEST_-prefixed sessions and one TEST_iter2 workspace (auto-purged on teardown). Two preexisting workspaces ('PETER AI v5 roadmap' + another) were used for the Cost scope switch validation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run with: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=$(grep REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL /app/frontend/.env | cut -d= -f2) pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v. test_iteration2.py covers the Message #347 checklist (stats?workspace_id=, session rename/delete, SSE event stream parsed correctly, memory regression). For SSE parsing note: server emits 'event: X\ndata: {...}' standard SSE format — parse the event: line for the type, not a JSON .type field.

verified_against_spec.footer_exact_text: PETER AI v4.0 — Intelligence, Elevated. Built in Indonesia. ✓
verified_against_spec.stats_workspace_id_filter: workspace_id=<id>, __none__, and unknown all return correct shape with workspace_id echoed ✓
verified_against_spec.cost_workspace_scope_switch: Updates immediately on selector change (verified: 'Scope: PETER AI v5 roadmap') ✓
verified_against_spec.streaming_sse_events: route → delta → done, TTFT < 5s, done includes tokens_estimated/cost_usd/saved_usd ✓
